**Determining strike announcement**

I need to check if this document announces a new or upcoming strike. The text appears to announce a 24-hour strike on February 24, 2025. It's from USB and mentions a national strike. It specifies certain timeframes where service will be provided, indicating operational guarantees during the strike. Based on this text, it’s clear that this document is announcing an upcoming strike. So, yes, it fits the criteria for an upcoming strike notice!
